name: South Broadway Country Club
about: South Broadway Country Club operates multiple indoor golf facilities across Denver and Fort Collins, utilizing TrackMan golf simulator technology. They offer golf simulator rentals, professional coaching services, and a full-service cocktail bar at their locations. The venues cater to golfers seeking an all-weather experience, with simulators available for practice, league play, and events.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium TrackMan simulator technology for accurate data and realistic course play
Full-service cocktail bar available at all locations
Professional golf coaching offered by certified instructors
Multiple locations across Denver and Fort Collins for convenience

food_and_drink.notes: Full-service cocktail bar with curated craft beverages

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium simulator technology used at all locations

faq.question: Do I need clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you need to bring your own golf clubs to use the simulators. The venue does not provide club rentals.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and drinks are not allowed, as the venue offers its own full-service kitchen and cocktail bar.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time to play 18 holes varies based on simulator availability and pace of play, but typically ranges from 2-3 hours.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The venue does not specifically advertise kid-friendly amenities or have information on policies regarding children.
